name: 撒糖型
description: 帝后之間從試探到親密的甜蜜對話，通常帶有撩撥和俏皮的元素。在大量虐戀和宮鬥之後，這類對白像甜點一樣讓觀眾滿足。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Since you are now my empress, you must protect me. Well, you promised me that. Who said I was going to protect you? Your hands. Since you rescued me, you must take full responsibility for me. Gross.
